sellers_note: Discover the versatility and convenience of this 2015 Nissan Rogue S. Thoughtfully designed to meet your everyday needs, this compact SUV offers a compelling blend of style, functionality, and performance. - Floor Mats & 2-PC Cargo Area Protector - 4 Speakers - AM/FM radio - CD player - Radio data system - Radio: AM/FM/CD/RDS/AUX NissanConnect Slip behind the wheel and experience the smooth, responsive handling of the 2.5L I4 DOHC 16V engine paired with a CVT with Xtronic transmission and AWD. With an EPA-estimated 25 city / 32 highway MPG, this Rogue delivers impressive efficiency to keep you on the road longer. The well-appointed interior provides comfort and convenience, featuring air conditioning, power windows, remote keyless entry, and steering wheel-mounted audio controls. Stay connected with the NissanConnect infotainment system, while the rear-view camera helps you navigate with confidence. Safety is a top priority, with features like ABS brakes, electronic stability control, and a suite of airbags providing protection for you and your passengers. The spacious cargo area and 60/40 split-folding rear seats offer the flexibility to accommodate your active lifestyle. Discover the exceptional value and versatility of this 2015 Nissan Rogue S. Visit our showroom today to experience it for yourself. Some of our Pre-Owned vehicles may be subject to unrepaired safety recalls.
